text:
Parkinson's disease and secondary parkinsonism, beneficiaries must have at least one inpatient, 
skilled nursing facility (SNF), or home health claim, or two Part B (institutional or non-institutional) 
claims that are at least one day apart, with a Parkinson's disease and secondary parkinsonism code in 
any position during the two-year reference period. 

You can find more detailed information on the algorithm criteria on the CCW website: 
https://www.ccwdata.org/web/guest/condition-categories-
